heading: Permit administration
label: 8543 Permit administration
notes: References in TextAs amended by this title, referred to in subsecs. (a)(3) and (b), means as amended by title III of .Pub. L. 118–234
amendments: References in TextAs amended by this title, referred to in subsecs. (a)(3) and (b), means as amended by title III of .Pub. L. 118–234

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Except as provided in subparagraph (B), in an area of Federal recreational lands and waters in which use by recreation service providers is allocated, if the Secretary concerned determines that visitor-use days are available for allocation to recreation service providers or holders of a commercial use authorization for outfitting and guiding, the Secretary concerned shall publish that information on the website of the agency that administers the applicable area of Federal recreational lands and waters.

children.label: I
children.text: the reissuance of an existing special recreation permit or commercial use authorization for outfitting and guiding; or

children.label: aa
children.text: a recreation service provider that is the holder of an existing special recreation permit; or

children.label: bb
children.text: a holder of an existing commercial use authorization for outfitting and guiding; or

children.label: I
children.text: to issue a new special recreation permit or new commercial use authorization for outfitting and guiding; or

children.label: II
children.text: to add a new or additional use to an existing special recreation permit or an existing commercial use authorization for outfitting and guiding.

children.heading: Updates
children.label: 2 Updates
children.text: The Secretary concerned shall ensure that information published on the website under this subsection is consistently updated to provide current and correct information to the public.

children.heading: Electronic mail notifications
children.label: 3 Electronic mail notifications
children.text: The Secretary concerned shall establish a system by which potential applicants for special recreation permits or commercial use authorizations for outfitting and guiding may subscribe to receive notification by electronic mail of the availability of special recreation permits under (as amended by this title) or commercial use authorizations for outfitting and guiding.section 6802(h)(1) of this title

children.heading: Permit application or proposal acknowledgment
children.label: b Permit application or proposal acknowledgment

children.text: provide to the applicant notice acknowledging receipt of the application or proposal; and

children.label: A
children.text: issue a final decision with respect to the application or proposal; or

children.label: B
children.text: provide to the applicant notice of a projected date for a final decision on the application or proposal.

children.heading: Effect
children.label: c Effect
children.text: Nothing in this section applies to a concession contract issued by the National Park Service for the provision of accommodations, facilities, or services.
